# SimplePlayer

> Framework-free Web Component video player. It gives users a clean default video player with custom overlay controls, a scrubber, volume, Picture-in-Picture, fullscreen, and lazy loading.

Site: https://simpleplayer.grizz.fyi/
GitHub: https://github.com/grizzshutsdown/simpleplayer
npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@grizzshutsdown/simpleplayer
Author: https://x.com/GrizzShutsDown

## Package

Install:

```bash
npm install @grizzshutsdown/simpleplayer
pnpm add @grizzshutsdown/simpleplayer
yarn add @grizzshutsdown/simpleplayer
bun add @grizzshutsdown/simpleplayer
```

## Agent Skill

SimplePlayer also ships a plain Markdown skill that AI agents can install and read for package-specific guidance:

```bash
npx @grizzshutsdown/simpleplayer
```

Import once:

```js
import '@grizzshutsdown/simpleplayer';
```

Default player:

```html
<simple-player src="/video.mp4"></simple-player>
```

Player with the extra control tray:

```html
<simple-player src="/video.mp4" controls></simple-player>
```

## Main Attributes

- `src`: video URL.
- `aspect-ratio`: player aspect ratio. Default: `16 / 9`.
- `preload-margin`: lazy-load margin before the video enters view. Default: `360px 0px`.
- `controls`: enables the extra control tray for volume, Picture-in-Picture, and fullscreen.
- `disable-autoplay`: turns off default muted autoplay.

## JavaScript Properties

Use properties when you want to keep the HTML clean:

```js
const player = document.querySelector('simple-player');

player.controlsEnabled = true;
player.volumeEnabled = true;
player.volumeSliderEnabled = false;
player.pictureInPictureEnabled = true;
player.fullscreenEnabled = true;
player.autoplayEnabled = false;
```

## Useful Source Files

- `src/simple-player.ts`: canonical Web Component source.
- `README.md`: usage, framework examples, styling variables, and contributing notes.
- `dev/`: local source playground for contributors.
- `site/`: production demo consumer app that installs the published npm package.
